Notice Of Hearing On Verified Application To Appear As Counsel Pro Hac Vice; Verified Application To Appear As Counsel Pro Hac Vice
Off Calendar Aug-01-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Maureen K. Bogue, Esq. of SEYFARTH SHAW 397-2823, for defendants MICHAEL KENT and RREEF MANAGEMENT COMPANY applying for an order to permit Ellen E. McLaughlin To Appear As Counsel Pro Hac Vice

RULING:
No other appearance on this matter. Tentative ruling adopted -- DEFENDANTS MICHAEL KENT and RREEF MANAGEMENT COMPANY'S Hearing On Verified Application (for an order to permit Ellen E. McLaughlin) To Appear As Counsel Pro Hac Vice -- Granted; proof of payment of $50 State Bar fee was presented to the Court during the hearing. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (KMC/301/JU) Reporter: Mitch Lyon, CSR #6840
